pi_items.source: Official Microsoft SQL Server sample database, downloadable from https://github.com/Microsoft/sql-server-samples/releases/download/adventureworks/AdventureWorks2022.bak
Task description (lines 1-4) specifies creation of: inline table-valued function, view, stored procedure, and export table
setup_task.sh line 22: rm -f /home/ga/Documents/exports/sales_cube_report.txt and task description line 3

Task description specifies 7 aggregation combinations: Grand Total, Category, Category+Subcategory, TerritoryGroup, TerritoryGroup+Territory, Year, Year+Quarter. The export_result.sh checks COUNT(DISTINCT GroupingLevel) which would reflect the number of unique GROUPING_ID() values returned by the function.

Web search for AdventureWorks2022 sales revenue 2011-2014 yielded: 2011=$14,155,699.53, 2012=$37,675,700.31, 2013=$48,965,887.96, 2014=$22,419,498.32. Total=$123,216,786.12. Setup_task.sh (lines 35-40) calculates reference revenue using SUM(LineTotal) from Sales.SalesOrderDetail for the date range 2011-01-01 to 2014-12-31.
setup_mssql.sh line 15 defines ADVENTUREWORKS_URL with this exact GitHub release URL
setup_task.sh lines 35-40 and export_result.sh use this exact date range for revenue calculations
Dataedo AdventureWorks schema documentation confirms Sales.SalesTerritory contains a 'Group' column for geographic area classification
setup_task.sh lines 37-39 specify: SELECT SUM(LineTotal) FROM Sales.SalesOrderDetail joined with Sales.SalesOrderHeader on SalesOrderID
Task description mentions aggregation by 'Category' and 'Category+Subcategory'. Dataedo schema confirms these tables exist in AdventureWorks2022

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on AdventureWorks2022, the official Microsoft SQL Server 2022 sample database downloaded from GitHub. It performs sales aggregation for dates 2011-01-01 to 2014-12-31, with a verified grand total revenue of $123,216,786.12 (within the claimed range of $100M-$150M). The database contains required tables: Sales.SalesOrderDetail/Header for transaction data, Production.ProductCategory/Subcategory for product dimensions, and Sales.SalesTerritory with a 'Group' column for territory grouping. The task requires 7 aggregation levels (Grand Total, Category, Category+Subcategory, TerritoryGroup, TerritoryGroup+Territory, Year, Year+Quarter), not the claimed minimum of 4.
